name: Group Representations
description: ρ:G→GL(V) homomorphism. Subrepresentation, irreducible. Maschke: char∤|G| ⇒ complete reducibility. Decomposition into irreducibles.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Representation\nρ:G→GL(V)"]
    D2["Def: Subrepresentation\nW ≤ V, GW⊆W"]
    D3["Def: Irreducible\nno proper subrep"]
    D4["Def: Direct sum\nV=⊕Vᵢ"]
    T1["Thm: Maschke\nchar∤|G| ⇒ semisimple"]
    T2["Thm: Complete reducibility\nV=⊕ irreducibles"]
    T3["Thm: Schur's lemma\nHom irreps 1-dim"]
    T4["Thm: Rep = kG-mod\nkG module"]
    T5["Thm: Regular rep\ndim⊕Vᵢ²=|G|"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> T2
    D4 --> T2
    T1 --> T2
    T3 --> T5
    T4 --> D1
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
